mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teams (owner_user_id, name, description) VALUES (#{ownerUserId}, #{name}, #{description})
INSERT INTO team_members (team_id, user_id, role, status, accepted_at) VALUES (#{teamId}, #{userId}, 'OWNER', 'ACTIVE', NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.owner_user_id, u.email AS owner_email, t.name, t.description, t.created_at, t.updated_at FROM teams t JOIN users u ON u.id = t.owner_user_id WHERE t.id = #{id}

SELECT t.id, t.owner_user_id, owner.email AS owner_email, t.name, t.description, tm.role, tm.status, t.created_at, t.updated_at, COALESCE(member_counts.member_count, 0) AS member_count, COALESCE(node_counts.node_count, 0) AS node_count FROM team_members tm JOIN teams t ON t.id = tm.team_id JOIN users owner ON owner.id = t.owner_user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT team_id, COUNT(*) AS member_count FROM team_members WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY team_id ) member_counts ON member_counts.team_id = t.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT team_id, COUNT(*) AS node_count FROM team_nodes GROUP BY team_id ) node_counts ON node_counts.team_id = t.id WHERE tm.user_id = #{userId} AND tm.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY t.created_at DESC

SELECT tm.id, tm.team_id, t.name AS team_name, tm.user_id, u.email, u.name, u.picture, tm.role, tm.status, tm.invited_by_user_id, inviter.email AS invited_by_email, tm.invited_at, tm.accepted_at, tm.rejected_at, tm.cancelled_at, tm.created_at, tm.updated_at FROM team_members tm JOIN teams t ON t.id = tm.team_id JOIN users u ON u.id = tm.user_id LEFT JOIN users inviter ON inviter.id = tm.invited_by_user_id WHERE tm.team_id = #{teamId} AND tm.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT tm.id, tm.team_id, t.name AS team_name, tm.user_id, u.email, u.name, u.picture, tm.role, tm.status, tm.invited_by_user_id, inviter.email AS invited_by_email, tm.invited_at, tm.accepted_at, tm.rejected_at, tm.cancelled_at, tm.created_at, tm.updated_at FROM team_members tm JOIN teams t ON t.id = tm.team_id JOIN users u ON u.id = tm.user_id LEFT JOIN users inviter ON inviter.id = tm.invited_by_user_id WHERE tm.id = #{id}

SELECT tm.id, tm.team_id, t.name AS team_name, tm.user_id, u.email, u.name, u.picture, tm.role, tm.status, tm.invited_by_user_id, inviter.email AS invited_by_email, tm.invited_at, tm.accepted_at, tm.rejected_at, tm.cancelled_at, tm.created_at, tm.updated_at FROM team_members tm JOIN teams t ON t.id = tm.team_id JOIN users u ON u.id = tm.user_id LEFT JOIN users inviter ON inviter.id = tm.invited_by_user_id WHERE tm.team_id = #{teamId} AND tm.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'INVITED') ORDER BY CASE tm.role WHEN 'OWNER' THEN 0 WHEN 'ADMIN' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, tm.created_at ASC

SELECT tm.id, tm.team_id, t.name AS team_name, tm.user_id, u.email, u.name, u.picture, tm.role, tm.status, tm.invited_by_user_id, inviter.email AS invited_by_email, tm.invited_at, tm.accepted_at, tm.rejected_at, tm.cancelled_at, tm.created_at, tm.updated_at FROM team_members tm JOIN teams t ON t.id = tm.team_id JOIN users u ON u.id = tm.user_id LEFT JOIN users inviter ON inviter.id = tm.invited_by_user_id WHERE tm.user_id = #{userId} AND tm.status = 'INVITED' ORDER BY tm.invited_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO team_members (team_id, user_id, role, status, invited_by_user_id, invited_at) VALUES (#{teamId}, #{userId}, 'MEMBER', 'INVITED', #{invitedByUserId}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE team_members SET role = 'MEMBER', status = 'INVITED', invited_by_user_id = #{invitedByUserId}, invited_at = NOW(), accepted_at = NULL, rejected_at = NULL, cancelled_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE team_members SET status = 'ACTIVE', accepted_at = NOW(), rejected_at = NULL, cancelled_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'INVITED'
UPDATE team_members SET status = 'REMOVED', cancelled_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND team_id = #{teamId} AND role <> 'OWNER' AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT n.id AS node_id, n.name AS node_name, n.os_type, n.status, CASE WHEN tn.node_id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS shared FROM nodes n LEFT JOIN team_nodes tn ON tn.node_id = n.id AND tn.team_id = #{teamId} WHERE n.user_id = #{ownerUserId} ORDER BY n.created_at DESC

SELECT n.id, n.user_id, n.name, n.os_type, n.status, n.last_seen, n.created_at, n.agent_id, n.agent_secret_hash, n.agent_secret_issued_at, n.update_status, n.update_current_sha, n.update_latest_sha, n.update_message, n.update_checked_at FROM team_nodes tn JOIN nodes n ON n.id = tn.node_id WHERE tn.team_id = #{teamId} ORDER BY n.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO team_nodes (team_id, node_id, granted_by_user_id) VALUES (#{teamId}, #{nodeId}, #{grantedByUserId})
